advantages: Magics add timing, profiling, installs and env control inline.
%pip installs into the correct kernel environment, avoiding import mismatches.
Keyboard shortcuts make cell editing and running fast.
autoreload streamlines editing external modules from a notebook.
disadvantages: Magics are notebook/IPython-specific and don't run in plain .py scripts.
Overusing ! shell calls makes notebooks less portable.
Shortcut differences across Jupyter/Colab/VS Code cause muscle-memory slips.
Heavy magic use can obscure what's actually plain Python.
